specs.title: cp-000: PresenterMode is lazy-loaded via Reactlazy with Suspense fallback showing Loadin
cp-001: Presenter mode filters out slides where hidden true before passing to PresenterM
cp-002: Presenter mode starts at the index of the current activeSlideId within the visib
cp-003: Entire workspace is wrapped in ThemeProvider themethemeConfig so theme context p
cp-004: Mode selection screen is shown only when slideslength 0 AND user has not yet cho
cp-005: Presenter receives masters themeKey themeConfig and transition from the store
cp-006: Default agentMode is draft not learn
cp-007: Default transition is fade
cp-008: Default themeKey is modern and themeConfig is PRESET_THEMESmodern
cp-009: RightPanel full type union properties agent comments versions analytics defense
cp-010: loadDeck clears agentChatHistory to empty array on every deck load
cp-011: loadDeck sets activeSlideId to the first slides ID and selectedSlideIds to a Set
cp-012: setActiveSlide clears selectedBlockIndices allBlocksSelected and editingBlockInd
cp-013: addSlide creates a slide with title New Slide and one text block type text data
cp-014: duplicateSlide appends copy to the original slides title
cp-015: deleteSlide is optimistic removes from local state first then restores slides ac
cp-016: reorderSlides is optimistic applies new order locally reverts on server failure
cp-017: Undo stack is capped at MAX_UNDO_HISTORY 50 entries
cp-018: Undo coalesces rapid changes to the same slide within a 500ms debounce window ke
cp-019: Calling undo or redo flushes any pending debounced undo entry first
cp-020: Any new edit clears the redo stack
cp-021: Save debounce _debouncedSave waits 800ms of inactivity then saveStatus goes savi
cp-022: Save is skipped if the slide was deleted during the debounce window
cp-023: customThemes support addCustomThemekey config and deleteCustomThemekey persisted
cp-024: institutionKit support setInstitutionKitkit for branding
cp-025: gridSize clamped between 1 and 100 defaults to 5
cp-026: Store exposes showFindReplace showSlideSorter showRulers showGrid snapToGrid sho
cp-027: Block clipboard copyBlock deep-clones selected blocks cutBlock copies then delet
cp-028: clipboardSlide for slide-level copypaste copySlideid strips id and sortOrder pas
cp-029: regenerateSlide tracks in-progress IDs via regeneratingSlideIds Set adds on star
cp-030: regenerateSlide sends context prevSlideTitle nextSlideTitle deckTitle audienceTy
cp-031: replaceAllSlides preserves activeSlideId if found in new slides otherwise falls
cp-032: Slides mode agent panel width is w-80 320px not w-360px like Gamma mode
cp-033: Global keyboard shortcuts registered on mount via registerGlobalShortcutsuseSlid
cp-034: PresenceBridgeSlot rendered for real-time collaboration sync
